posts.author: t22design (shane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Turning workspaces into Printable Production Sheets for our Designers and Production Staff.
We would Love to be able to Open an WORKSPACE, Click on an ITEM in that WORKSPACE and print it as a work / Production sheet for our employees.
